candidate_definition_hints.text: RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN with great LLM performance, which can also be directly trained like a GPT transformer (parallelizable). We are at RWKV-7 "Goose". So it's combining the best of RNN and transformer - great performance, linear time, constant space (no kv-cache), fast training, infinite ctx_len, and free sentence embedding.
RWKV website: https://rwkv.com (with 150+ papers training various RWKV models)

candidate_glosses.text: RWKV website: https://rwkv.com (with 150+ papers training various RWKV models)
